# Vendor Dependencies

## GLAD (OpenGL loader)
Download from: https://glad.dav1d.de/
- Language: C
- Specification: OpenGL
- API: gl 3.3
- Profile: Core
- Extensions: (none needed)
- Generate and place files into this directory.

## ImGui (Immediate Mode GUI)
Clone from: https://github.com/ocornut/imgui
- Copy these files into this directory:
  - imgui.h, imgui.cpp
  - imgui_draw.cpp, imgui_tables.cpp, imgui_widgets.cpp
  - imgui_internal.h, imconfig.h, imstb_rectpack.h, imstb_textedit.h, imstb_truetype.h
  - backends/imgui_impl_glfw.h, backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
  - backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.h, backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp
  - backends/imgui_impl_opengl3_loader.h

## stb_image (Image loading)
Download from: https://github.com/nothings/stb
- Copy stb_image.h into this directory.

## stb_truetype (Font rendering)
Download from: https://github.com/nothings/stb
- Copy stb_truetype.h into this directory.
